description: Style Note Lend a new season twist to your wardrobe with this pair of red chief shoes. Crafted from the highest quality leather (that's also recyclable!) which won't burn a hole in your pocket - this is your go-to option for comfy leather footwear. Product Details Caramel brown leather shoe with central lace-ups and a padded tongue (has cut outs with dark brown inlays) Padded inner and a foamy rubber midsole TPU outsole with circular nubs all over Material and Care Leather Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not store under direct sunlight
